description: DreadForge_Resonance: Enforces atmospheric integrity for action-horror hybrids by binding spawns and engagement zones to geo-historical invariants.

tile_profiles.description: Team spawns, forward bases, insertion zones. Must feel haunted by past conflict.
Front lines, chokepoints, dug-in positions. High trauma imprint required.
Corridors, stairwells, bridges, breach doors. High threshold stress enforced.

UEC.description: Maintain uncertainty; players should rarely feel fully safe.

EMD.description: Clues hint at deeper structure without full resolution.

STCI.description: Threat vs safety remains readable; punish overconfidence, not comprehension.

CDL.description: Moderate cognitive load to avoid overwhelm during sustained firefights.

ARR.description: Most mysteries remain ambiguous; the battlefield is never fully solved.
